meaning: n.等级,横列,阶级adj.繁茂的,恶臭的,讨厌的,下流的vt.排列,归类于,把...分等vi.列为,列队n.[数] 秩
examples: We are the 1346th-ranked Deadly Twin Stars.
He was soon promoted to the rank of captain.
He rose to the rank of general.
Luckily there was a taxi rank nearby.
They do not want to risk the relative performance rank they achieved on the downside.
